---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature idea briefly. Chinese or English is welcome.

## Problem or Use Case

What problem would this solve? What workflow is blocked today?

## Proposed Solution

What would you like CodexLens to do?

## Alternatives Considered

Are there any workarounds or alternative approaches?

## Extra Context

Add screenshots, examples, or references here if helpful. Please redact sensitive local data before posting.
